paraphrase_options.N: no-causation reading: '<Obj-np> moved, but not because of <subj>'s <gerund>.'

selection_rule.affirm_pooling: FC chose construction-reading C OR NLI == 0 (entailment); pooled over models x instruments x objects unless stated
selection_rule.note: Applied by harvest.py AFTER the baseline arm runs; FROZEN here pre-run. No retuning, no threshold relaxation, no second harvest (design §5 G4).
